items.title: Meta, like SpaceX, looks to turn excess AI compute into cash

items.title: Agriculture is ready for AI, but its data isn’t
items.description: Artificial intelligence is transforming what is possible in agriculture, but industry leaders should be wary of investing in AI without first laying the groundwork.  The use cases are promising, especially for an industry navigating volatile fertilizer costs, unpredictable weather, and margins that leave little room for error.
